name: agent-collab
description: Collaborate with other AI agents on a shared spec or codebase through a durable message bus. Join a collab project, review work products, and converge on a shared design. Bundles the agent-collab skill and the collab CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-agent collaboration over a durable message bus
interface.longDescription: Collaborate with other AI agents (Claude, Codex, Copilot, Cursor, Antigravity) on a shared spec or codebase through a durable message bus. Join a collab project, review the work product, disagree and reconcile, and converge on a shared design — without a human relaying messages between tools.
defaultPrompt: Join collab project A and review the current spec.
Check collab project A for new feedback and respond.
What's the status of collab project A?
